TERMS & CONDITIONS

Last updated: 2025
1. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
WARTIME: Sovereign Dominion, including all game code, assets, design, artwork, UI, mechanics, characters, and content, is the exclusive intellectual property of Fizzy Studios. All rights are reserved. Unauthorized copying, redistribution, modification, reverse engineering, or resale of this game or any portion of it — in whole or in part — is strictly prohibited without explicit written permission from Fizzy Studios.
2. NO THEFT OR CLONING
You may not copy, clone, re-skin, or redistribute this game under a different name or brand. You may not pass off any portion of this game as your own work. Fizzy Studios reserves the right to pursue legal action against parties found to have plagiarized or stolen this game.
3. PERMITTED USE
You are permitted to play this game for personal, non-commercial enjoyment. You may share the game's official URL with friends. You may stream or create video content featuring gameplay, provided you credit WARTIME: Sovereign Dominion by Fizzy Studios.
4. GAME DATA & PROGRESS
Game progress is stored locally in your browser. Fizzy Studios is not responsible for loss of progress due to clearing browser data, switching devices, or any technical issue. No warranty is made regarding data persistence.
5. DISCLAIMER OF WARRANTIES
This game is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Fizzy Studios makes no guarantees regarding uninterrupted availability, freedom from bugs, or fitness for any particular purpose. Play at your own risk.
6. CHANGES TO TERMS
Fizzy Studios reserves the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the game constitutes acceptance of any revised terms.
7. CONTACT
For licensing inquiries, permission requests, or to report unauthorized use, please contact Fizzy Studios directly.

SECRET QUEST

Description

⚡ GAME MODES
Special ways to play
⚡
BLITZ MODE
90 seconds · Highest HQ% wins
Race against the clock — no time to plan, only react. If time runs out, whoever has the healthier HQ wins.
🌊
HORDE MODE
Endless waves · Survive as long as possible
Face endless escalating enemy waves. Every 30s the enemy gets stronger. Score points per wave survived — your HQ is your lifeline.
🪞
MIRROR MATCH
Same nation vs itself · Pure skill
A random nation is selected — both you and your opponent play the exact same army. No nation advantage. Pure tactics.
SELECT NATION
Choose your army for this mode

🗺️ LONG MATCH
Grid Conquest · 20-30 Minutes
📋 How it works
Conquer an 8×8 grid tile by tile. Each tile you attack triggers a battle using the standard engine. Capture 15 bases then destroy the enemy HQ to win.
Unlock a Tech Tree between battles — upgrade units to Tier 3, build defences, unlock airstrikes and more.
